UI_PAV_AimStanceOnlyTooltip: Active only while aiming a weapon (right-click held).
UI_PAV_RangeTooltip: How far around the player walls fade out, in tiles.
UI_PAV_DrivingSpeedTooltip: Maximum speed at which wall cutaway stays active in a vehicle.
UI_PAV_DrivingSpeedDescription: Value in km/h. 0 = always off in a vehicle.
UI_PAV_FixB42Tooltip: Prevents upper-floor walls from vanishing next to player-built structures.
UI_PAV_FadeNWTreesTooltip: Fades trees the character can see past, revealing what's behind them.
UI_PAV_TreeFadeRangeTooltip: How far around the player trees fade out, in tiles.
UI_PAV_TreeFadeDrivingSpeedTooltip: Maximum speed at which tree fade stays active in a vehicle. With the speed-snap, fade keeps up at any driving speed — high values just mean 'always on while driving'.
UI_PAV_TreeFadeDrivingSpeedDescription: Value in km/h. 0 = always off in a vehicle.
UI_PAV_TreeFadeStayOnWhileDrivingTooltip: Keeps tree fade active in vehicles even when 'Active only in nimble stance' is enabled.
UI_PAV_TreeFadeStayOnWhileOnFootTooltip: Keeps tree fade active on foot even when 'Active only in nimble stance' is enabled. Lets you keep the rest of the mod gated to nimble stance (e.g. for around-the-corner peeks) while tree fade always works.
UI_PAV_TreeFadeStayOnWhileDrivingDescrip: Both options above only have effect when 'Active only in nimble stance' is enabled.
UI_PAV_JavaMissingDescription: WARNING: PeekAView's Java component is not loaded — the settings below have no effect. You declined loading the mod's JAR through ZombieBuddy. Re-enable PeekAView's Java code in ZombieBuddy to activate the mod.
